bugs.title: Store form accepts invalid timezone and creates store without validation
steps: Open Stores > Create store as admin
Enter unique QA store code and name
bugs.expected: Form rejects the invalid timezone with an inline validation/backend validation message and stays on the create form.
bugs.actual: Store is created successfully and SPA navigates to store details.
bugs.network: POST store create returned success; no validation error surfaced in UI.
bugs.refreshRecovers: No; refresh stays on the created store detail route because invalid data was persisted.
bugs.userImpact: Admins can persist malformed timezone values, which can confuse operators and may break date/time expectations for store data.
